author: maxine--tui-startup-sync
content: Result: Implemented all 3 sync features (AC-7, AC-8, AC-9). Startup sync: mod.rs:665-671, fetch+hydrate before alternate screen with 'Syncing...' message. Periodic sync: mod.rs:692-694, checks elapsed > 30s each loop tick, spawns background fetch. Manual refresh: mod.rs:213-215, global 'r' calls start_background_sync(). On sync completion poll_sync() hydrates DB and calls force_refresh() on active tab. 6 files changed, 151 insertions, 52 deletions. All 186 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean. Commit d60cfec on branch feature/add-tui-startup-sync-periodic-refresh-and-manual-r. Ready for push and PR.
